channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate Republicans Seek Improved Relationship with House GOP
item.description: Republicans in the Senate are calling for better communication with their House counterparts amid budget reconciliation efforts.

item.title: FBI Questions CIA Officers Regarding Russia Assessment
item.description: The FBI is interviewing current and former CIA personnel as part of an investigation related to ex-CIA Director John Brennan.

item.title: Ralph Norman on Trump's Gas Tax Pause Proposal
item.description: Representative Ralph Norman stated that a pause in the federal gas tax, as proposed by President Trump, is timely and beneficial.

item.title: FBI Director Patel to Testify Before Senate
item.description: Kash Patel is scheduled to appear before the Senate regarding the FBI's budget request as part of a larger DOJ funding proposal.
